title: Corpse Dirt
description: Spawns dirt when you fall into void
body:
This is a single mixin mod that spawns dirt when you fell into the void at you death pos.

Does not replace any existing blocks.

## Where would I use this mod?

In a skyblock playthrough, as a challenge.

## Why corpse dirt?
Here is your answer: 

[Beating Minecraft's Hardest Modpack With Nothing // Episode 1 - Corpse Dirt](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r0kOwRvgE1A&list=PLCLsyCud3iSG9yKbOD6vRzA_YRK12gAXE&index=1)

## Checkout my skyblock mod
[ZenXArch's skyblock](https://modrinth.com/mod/zenxarchs-skyblock)
